name: open_or_resume_direct_or_multi_person_messages
description: Deprecated: opens or resumes a slack direct message (dm) or multi-person direct message (mpim). use `open dm` instead.

users.description:
Comma-separated list of user IDs (1 for a DM, or 2-8 for an MPIM) to open/resume a conversation. Order is preserved for MPIMs. Do not use if `channel` is provided.
Examples:
  "U0123456789"
  "U0123456789,U9876543210"

channel.description:
ID or name of an existing DM or MPIM channel to open/resume. Do not use if `users` is provided.
Examples:
  "D0123456789"
  "general"

return_im.description: If `true`, returns the full DM channel object. Applies only when opening a DM via a single user ID in `users` (not with `channel`).
